title: SNDL Inc Q4 2024 Earnings Call Highlights: Record Revenue and Strategic Growth Amidst Market Challenges
text: SNDL Inc reported record full-year financial results for 2024, achieving $920 million in net revenue with a 1.3% year-over-year increase. The company demonstrated significant operational improvements through enhanced profitability metrics. The cannabis retailer reached all-time highs in gross profit and margins. Full-year gross margin improved by 520 basis points to 26.1%, while Q4 specifically achieved a 360 basis point improvement to 26.7%. The company generated positive free cash flow of $8.9 million for the full year, exceeding guidance and representing a $70 million improvement versus 2023. The cannabis segment drove growth momentum with 12 consecutive quarters of revenue gains, expanding 16.5% in Q4. Cannabis retail operations contributed $83.2 million in Q4 revenue, up 10.7% annually, with same-store sales increasing 6.3%. The liquor segment faced headwinds, declining 3.4% in Q4 2024. Management anticipates flat revenue growth for this division in 2025. A $65.7 million non-cash fair value adjustment related to the SunStream investment resulted in a negative Q4 net income of $67.2 million. The company holds a strong balance sheet with $218 million in unrestricted cash and zero debt. Strategic acquisitions, including Indiva, positioned SNDL as Canada's largest infused edibles manufacturer.
